mnemonics: S.C.O.R.E. Big: Suggested, Curated, Online, Resources, Evaluated, Books, journals, government, guides
keyPoints: Suggested resources are starting points, not exhaustive lists.
Resources include textbooks, academic journals, online databases, and official government or organizational guides.
The quality, relevance, and authority of a resource must be evaluated before use.
commonMistakes: Treating the suggested list as a complete bibliography for research.
Using resources without checking their credibility, date of publication, or potential bias.
Over-relying on a single type of resource (e.g., only websites) instead of a diverse mix.
